description: Added a SHA256 checksum of the full S_30 dataset, as well as a random sample of 5 nonzero (i,j,k,g) entries from kronecker_n30. This allows reviewers to verify both file integrity and correctness of individual entries.
action_taken: Added a SHA256 checksum of the full S_30 dataset, as well as a random sample of 5 nonzero (i,j,k,g) entries from kronecker_n30. This allows reviewers to verify both file integrity and correctness of individual entries.
